tool.name: genePredToBed
tool.description: convert a genePred gene model to BED12

param.label: Input genePred
param.help: Tab-separated genePred table, e.g. from gff3ToGenePred.

param.name: fill_space
param.label: Fill spaces in name with underscore
param.help: Replace space characters in the 'name' field with underscores.

param.label: BED score
param.help: Value written to the BED score column (default 0).

tool.help:
**genePredToBed** — convert a UCSC **genePred** gene model into 12-column **BED**.
This is the second half of the GFF3 -> browsable track path: after `gff3ToGenePred` produces a genePred, `genePredToBed` yields BED12 (with block structure) that can be sorted and passed to `bedToBigBed`.
-----
**Input**
- `Input genePred` — tab-separated genePred table.
**Output**
- A 12-column BED (`bed12`): chrom, start, end, name, score, strand, thickStart, thickEnd, itemRgb, blockCount, blockSizes, blockStarts.
-----
**Key options**
- `-fillSpace` — replace spaces in the name with underscores. - `-score` — value for the BED score column (default 0).
Input is always parsed as tab-separated (`-tab`).
